description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: unix, unix-cmake, and windows. The unix job runs on ubuntu and macos with different compilers and definitions, and performs make test and make coverage. The unix-cmake job runs on ubuntu and macos with cmake, configures and tests. The windows job runs on windows-latest with different architectures and definitions, configures and tests with cmake.
